calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-23-2017 Off Calendar

Notice Of Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Jan-24-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Paul Alvarado, Clerk: A. Mok. Proceedings reported by: Mitch Lyon, CSR#6840.

Bryana McGuirk, Esq., appearing for Plaintiffs, FILMON TEKLEHAIMANOT and MICHAEL GHEBREMICHAEL, sworn and examined,
No appearance by defaulted defendant WILLIE JOSEPH CALDWELL,
Default of Defendant has been duly entered.

After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiffs and against Defaulted Defendant as follows:
Damages: $10,000.00
Pre-Judgment Interest: $0.00
Attorney's Fees: $0.00
Costs: $541.40
Total Judgment in the amount of $10,541.40

Judgment signed in open court.
